texto: There is a very great difference — is there not? — between the temporal and the eternal judgments, a very great difference between a man's reputation and a man's character, for reputation is what men think and say of us, while character is what God and the angels know of us.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Price Collier que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “There is a very great difference — is there not? — between the temporal and the eternal judgments…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, character, there, com foco em reflexao.
